During this time the input receives focus, so when i focus a blur event is fired in input and that caused the calendar to close again. So i added an attribute in calendar component to prevent focusing of cell.  && [BUGFIX] where to begin with this one. first issue is calendar was closing when drilldown button was clicked. During this time the input receives focus, so when i focus a blur event is fired in input and that caused the calendar to close again. So i added an attribute in calendar component to prevent focusing of cell.  && [BUGFIX] where to begin with this one. first issue is calendar was closing when drilldown button was clicked. During this time the input receives focus, so when i focus a blur event is fired in input and that caused the calendar to close again.
